topic: Argentina 3-0 Algeria: Messi hat trick ties Klose's all-time World Cup goal record (16) in Group J opener at Arrowhead Stadium, Kansas City
subject: lionel-messi

hook.spoken_hook: Needed three for history. Delivered a hat trick.

scenes.voiceover: Needed three for history. Delivered a hat trick.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black background with gold gradient energy arcs (#F7D774 to #C8881B), bold condensed white type reading 'NEEDED 3 / SCORED 3', a faceless Argentina #10 silhouette emerging from shadow, premium broadcast feel, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Four World Cups, never a hat trick. At 38, he changed that.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background with a glowing gold circle framing the number '0' crossed out in red, bold white condensed type 'FIRST WC HAT TRICK', shadowy Argentina kit silhouette, broadcast-grade, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: De Paul split them. Messi buried a screamer.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background with a curved gold trajectory line arcing toward a top-corner net graphic, bold white '17' with a rocket icon, faceless strike silhouette in Argentina colors, motion energy, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Hour mark. Second goal. Now chasing Klose's all-time record.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black background with a glowing gold '2' dominating the frame, bold white condensed 'BRACE' stacked below, gold dust particles rising, faceless Argentina silhouette arms-wide, vertical 9:16 broadcast.

scenes.voiceover: Eleven minutes later. Hat trick done. Sixteen goals—tied a twelve-year-old record.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Explosive gold confetti over deep black, a giant bold gold '16' in the center with 'TIED' in white condensed below, faceless Argentina celebration silhouette, vertical 9:16, climactic broadcast finish.

scenes.voiceover: Argentina top Group J, three-nil. Subscribe for a World Cup story every day.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Clean black-and-gold ranked group-standings table, white condensed type, flag icons and 3-letter codes, Argentina row highlighted in glowing gold, vertical 9:16 broadcast graphic.

comment_bait: Messi tied Klose tonight. Ronaldo plays tomorrow. Who breaks the record first? Convince me I'm wrong about your pick.
cta: Follow for a World Cup story every single day
music_mood: triumphant orchestral swell with a rising cinematic drop, gold-tinged hero energy, building to a big release on the hat trick reveal

thumbnail.concept: Lionel Messi's CC portrait (Argentina kit, the known Wikimedia face) on a deep black background, gold '16' big and bold beside him, 'HAT TRICK' tag in white, premium broadcast look, no broadcast imagery.

youtube_title: Messi Hat Trick vs Algeria: Argentina 3-0 World Cup 2026 — Ties Klose's Record
youtube_description: Argentina 3-0 Algeria — Lionel Messi's first ever World Cup hat trick ties Miroslav Klose's all-time record of 16 goals. The defending champions open Group J with a statement win in Kansas City. Messi now has 16 World Cup goals across five tournaments. Ronaldo plays tomorrow — who breaks the record first? Subscribe for a World Cup story every single day. #WorldCup2026 #Argentina #Messi
instagram_caption: Needed three. Scored three. Messi ties Klose's all-time WC record with a hat trick 🇦🇷 Argentina 3-0 Algeria. Messi tied it tonight. Ronaldo plays tomorrow. Who breaks the record first? Convince me I'm wrong 👇 Follow @tikitakafootytv for a World Cup story every day.
